news.title:
Medplus subsidiary store in Telangana faced drug license suspension for a day.
Suspension led to an estimated revenue loss of 0.42 lakh; order dated 27 Feb 2026.
news.summary:

news.summary:

news.title:
Medplus Health's Pune store faces a 15-day drug license suspension from Feb 3, 2026.
Estimated revenue loss is Rs 6.27 lakh; action under Drugs and Cosmetics Act.
news.summary:
Medplus Health's Pune store faces a 15-day drug license suspension from Feb 3, 2026.

news.title:
MedPlus Health targets 600 new stores by FY26, expanding across 13 states.
The company highlights strong revenue growth alongside its expansion plans.
news.summary:
MedPlus Health targets 600 new stores by FY26, expanding across 13 states.
The company highlights strong revenue growth alongside its expansion plans.

news.title:
MedPlus Health Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 18,061.2M and net profit at Rs. 577.9M.
The board approved allotment of 2,32,061 equity shares under ESOP 2021 and statutory auditors expressed an unmodified opinion on the financials.
news.summary:
MedPlus Health Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 18,061.2M and net profit at Rs. 577.9M.
The board approved allotment of 2,32,061 equity shares under ESOP 2021 and statutory auditors expressed an unmodified opinion on the financials.

news.title:
Medplus Health's subsidiary store's drug license suspended for 7 days in Andhra Pradesh.
Action under Drugs and Cosmetics Act; revenue loss estimated at Rs 2.4 lakhs.
news.summary:
Medplus Health's subsidiary store's drug license suspended for 7 days in Andhra Pradesh.
Action under Drugs and Cosmetics Act; revenue loss estimated at Rs 2.4 lakhs.

news.title:
Medplus subsidiary Optival Health received favorable court ruling for AY 2020-21 against Rs. 43.5 Cr tax demand.
Income Tax Dept filed review petition; no immediate financial impact noted. Company informed exchanges and updated website.
news.summary:
Medplus subsidiary Optival Health received favorable court ruling for AY 2020-21 against Rs. 43.5 Cr tax demand.
Income Tax Dept filed review petition; no immediate financial impact noted. Company informed exchanges and updated website.

news.title:
MedPlus Health Services revised the link for its Feb 2, 2026 earnings call.
Details and updated links are available on MedPlus, BSE, and NSE websites.
news.summary:
MedPlus Health Services revised the link for its Feb 2, 2026 earnings call.
Details and updated links are available on MedPlus, BSE, and NSE websites.

news.title:

news.summary:

news.title:

No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared during these meetings.

news.title:

The suspension, dated Jan 10, 2026, may cause a revenue loss of Rs 0.74 lakh.
news.summary:

news.title:
MedPlus Health Services schedules board meeting on Jan 30, 2026 to review Q3 FY26 unaudited results.
Trading window for insiders closed Jan 1-Feb 1, 2026; results to be shared post-meeting and published.

This suspension is projected to cause a revenue loss of ₹2.1 lakh.

news.title:
Medplus Health Services' promoter, Agilemed Investments, released pledged shares on 24.12.2025.
Shares were released due to debt repayment; Catalyst Trusteeship acted as the debenture trustee.
news.summary:

news.title:
Medplus promoters pledged 48.5L shares (4.05% of total) on Dec 16, 2025.
Pledge may rise to 28% but expected to reduce to 24.5% post refinancing.
news.summary:
Medplus promoters pledged 48.5L shares (4.05% of total) on Dec 16, 2025.
Pledge may rise to 28% but expected to reduce to 24.5% post refinancing.

news.title:
Agilemed Investments Pvt Ltd pledged 48.51L shares of Medplus Health Services Ltd on 16.12.2025 to repay existing debt.
Debenture Trustee Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd facilitated the pledge, with Neo Assets Management as the lender.
news.summary:
Agilemed Investments Pvt Ltd pledged 48.51L shares of Medplus Health Services Ltd on 16.12.2025 to repay existing debt.
